title: Raise GPT-5 default max tokens to 2000 in LangGraphScore and TactusScore

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Starting implementation for GPT-5 token budget defaults. Scope: (1) LangGraphScore default max_tokens 500->2000 while preserving explicit overrides, (2) TactusScore preprocessing to inject max_tokens=2000 into ClassifyProcedure only when default_model is openai/gpt-5* and max_tokens is not explicitly set, (3) update internal Tactus authoring example from 1000->2000, (4) add targeted unit tests for LangGraph and Tactus defaulting behavior.
